kernel_subject: net: dev: Makes sure netif_rx() can be invoked in any context.
stage1_reason: First commit explicitly replaces netif_rx_ni() with netif_rx() due to kernel API change documented in commit baebdf48c3600, which made netif_rx() safe in any context. Other changes are code improvements unrelated to API changes.
stage2_reason: Driver commit 00f4a0afb7ea replaces netif_rx_ni() with netif_rx() directly referencing kernel API change from baebdf48c360 that made netif_rx() safe in any context.
